common.whyCitations: Why am I seeing these citations?

nav.mockMode: Mock mode — set POE_API_KEY for real scans

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to see how AI sees you.
auth.name: Name
auth.signupSubtitle: 5 free AI visibility scans — results in under 10 minutes.
auth.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account — it will take you straight into setup.
auth.noEmailHint: No email after a few minutes? Check spam, or
auth.linkFailed: Sign-in link failed: {error}. Please log in or sign up again.

onboarding.title: Set up your scan
onboarding.subtitle: We only need the basics to run your first scan — but the more you tell us, the sharper your prompts, scores and recommendations will be.
onboarding.descriptionHint: A short description helps us phrase scan prompts the way your buyers actually ask — better detail, better results.
onboarding.moreDetail: Add more detail — competitors, market, language
onboarding.step2Hint: Step 2 scans ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini & Perplexity — under a minute.
onboarding.demoLink: Or explore with a demo project first
onboarding.scanBody: Asking ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Perplexity the questions your buyers ask. This usually takes under a minute.

dashboard.firstScanSubtitle: Your first scan will populate this dashboard.
dashboard.scanInProgressBody: We're asking ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity and Google AI Overview about your brand. Refresh in a minute.
dashboard.noScansBody: Run a scan to see how AI engines answer your buyers' questions.
dashboard.competitorBenchmarkHint: Share of voice across all AI answers
dashboard.googleTrendsHint: Rising searches in {country} — generate content while demand grows
dashboard.nothingOpen: Nothing open — run a scan to refresh recommendations.
dashboard.noShareLinks: No share links yet — create one on Reports to share your progress.
dashboard.scoreExplanation: Your AI Visibility Score reflects how frequently your brand is discovered and referenced across leading AI platforms.
dashboard.weeklyTrendHint: Your AI Visibility Score, week by week

monitor.title: Monitor
monitor.subtitleEmpty: What does AI say about you? Run a scan to find out
monitor.subtitleScanned: What AI actually says about you — scan {time} · {prompts} prompts × {engines} platforms
monitor.heatmapHint: Where your brand appears, prompt by prompt
monitor.noResultsBody: Your first completed scan will map every prompt against every engine here.
monitor.promptExplorerHint: What each engine actually said — mentions, competitors and sources per answer
monitor.trendingHint: Rising searches in {industry} — explore more on Trends
monitor.trendsLocked: Trending searches are available on Starter and Pro

sources.title: Sources
sources.subtitleScanned: Why AI mentions you — where engines got their information, from the scan {time}
sources.subtitleEmpty: Why AI mentions you — run a scan to see where engines get their information
sources.citedSourcesHint: Every domain AI engines referenced — expand a source to see the exact answers that cited it
sources.emptyBody: Citations show up when engines reference specific pages — most often on Perplexity and Google AI Overview. Run a scan, then publish citable content (FAQ, comparison pages, docs) to grow this list.
sources.listedInSources: Listed in this answer's cited sources:

why.official: This is one of your own properties — the engine trusted your content directly. Keep it fresh and structured so it stays citable.
why.competitor: The engine sourced its answer from a competitor's site. Publishing a comparable (or better) page on this topic can win the citation back.
why.review: Review platforms carry strong weight with AI engines. Your presence and ratings there directly shape how you're described.
why.news: News coverage gives engines recent, dated evidence about your brand. Fresh coverage keeps answers current.
why.docs: Documentation is highly citable — clear, factual, structured. Engines lean on it when explaining what a product does.
why.knowledge_base: Help-center content answers buyer questions in the exact Q&A format engines prefer to cite.
why.blog: Editorial content earned this citation. Topics that get cited are worth expanding into deeper pages.
why.third_party: An independent site the engine considers credible on this topic. Getting mentioned there strengthens your visibility.

sources.frequency: This source was referenced in {count} answers in your latest scan.
sources.frequencyOnce: This source was referenced once in your latest scan.
sources.frequencyHigh: This source appeared approximately {times} times more often than similar sources.
sources.breakdownHint: What kinds of sources AI platforms trust — share of citations and trend vs your previous scan
sources.citedDomainsTip: The unique websites AI assistants pointed to when answering questions in your market.
sources.yourPropertiesTip: How many cited sources are your own pages — content AI trusts and quotes directly.
sources.competitorSitesTip: Cited sources that belong to your competitors and shape how AI describes them.

trends.title: Trends
trends.subtitle: What should I write about? Search demand in {country} · {language}, turned into content in one click
trends.locked: Google Trends insights are available on Starter and Pro
trends.searchPlaceholder: Search a keyword — or several, comma-separated, to compare
trends.interestHint: Interest change over the selected timeframe
trends.risingQueries: Rising queries in your category and market
trends.topQueriesHint: What your market searches for the most
trends.trendingNowHint: Broader themes gaining attention in your market right now

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.subtitle: What should I do next? Ready-to-publish assets, not generic advice

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: What changed since your last visit — every meaningful move in one feed
timeline.keyInsightsHint: The moves that matter most right now
timeline.activityHint: Filter by what you care about
timeline.notePlaceholder: Leave a note for your team…
timeline.emptyFeed: Nothing here yet — events appear as you scan, optimize and share.

improve.title: Improve
improve.subtitle: Am I improving? Tracking {count} scans since {date}
improve.notEnoughBody: Improve compares scans over time. Run at least two scans (ideally a week apart) to see trends, share-of-voice shifts and before/after impact.
improve.nothingCompleted: Nothing completed yet — mark actions done on Optimize as you ship them.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Am I improving? Share the proof with clients, execs and your team
reports.shareLinksHint: Read-only report pages for clients and execs — no login required
reports.shareProgressHint: Auto-generated social copy — edit it, then post anywhere
reports.execSummaryHint: A one-page briefing on your AI visibility, written for stakeholders
reports.exportHint: Latest scan, ready to send — exports carry no platform branding
reports.digestOn: Enabled — sent every Monday morning with your score, trends and top actions
reports.digestOff: Available on Starter and Pro — a Monday-morning summary of score changes, competitor moves and new recommendations
reports.upgradeToEnable: Upgrade on the Billing page to enable.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: You're on the {plan} plan
billing.lifetimeNote: You're on the Lifetime plan (AppSumo) — weekly scans, trends and sharing included forever. Upgrade below only if you need more capacity.
billing.perProjectHint: Up to {count} per project each month
billing.comparePlansHint: The same plans and pricing you see before signing in
billing.billingNote: Billing runs on Polar.sh once configured; until then plans switch instantly as a demo.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Project, prompts and competitors
settings.competitorsHint: {count} of {max} on your {plan} plan — enter a domain, we fetch the name and logo. Drag to reorder.
settings.promptsHint: {count} active of {max} on your {plan} plan — these are the questions we ask every engine
settings.teamHint: {count} of {max} seats on your {plan} plan — members can run scans and generate content, viewers see reports only
settings.teamLockedHint: Invite teammates on Starter and Pro — members can run scans, generate content and comment
settings.teamLocked: Team seats are available on Starter and Pro —
settings.pendingInvites: Pending invites activate automatically when the teammate signs in with that email.
settings.dangerHint: Deletes the workspace with all scans and content
settings.noCompetitors: No competitors yet — add one below.
settings.noMembers: No teammates yet — invite one below.
settings.invitePending: Invite pending — joins on first sign-in
settings.deleteConfirm: Delete “{name}” and all its scans, content and history? This cannot be undone.
settings.archiveConfirm: Archive “{name}”? Its data is kept and it stops counting toward your plan limit. You can restore it anytime.
settings.archivedHint: Archived projects keep their history and don't count toward your plan limit
settings.monitoringHint: Scheduled scans keep your visibility history fresh without manual runs
settings.autoScanBody: Runs every Monday within your plan's monthly scan limit. Archived projects are never scanned.
settings.monitoringLocked: Scheduled monitoring is available on Starter and Pro —
settings.brandLogoHint: Optional — shown in the project switcher and on reports; we fall back to your site's favicon.
settings.brandingHint: Your company identity on exported reports — logo, name and website
settings.viewerOnlyNote: On your plan, invited teammates join as viewers (reports only). Upgrade to Pro to add editing members.

summary.title: Last scan summary
summary.noOpenAction: Nothing open — your next scan will refresh recommendations.

platform.notMentionedYet: Not mentioned in any answer yet.

share.locked: Share links are available on Starter and Pro — upgrade on the Billing page.

generator.instructionsPlaceholder: Optional instructions — tone, focus keywords, specific pages…
generator.recHint: Prioritized from your latest scan — click the circle to track progress
generator.noRecommendations: No recommendations yet — run a scan on Monitor to generate them.

assistant.title: AI Copilot
assistant.sug2: Where am I losing to competitors?
assistant.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

switcher.limitReached: Your {plan} plan includes {max} active projects — archive one in Settings or upgrade to add more.

benchmarks.title: Market Benchmarks
benchmarks.subtitle: How you compare in {industry} · {country}
benchmarks.subtitleLocked: See how your AI visibility compares against your market
benchmarks.lockedBody: Compare your visibility against your industry and market — available on Starter and Pro.
benchmarks.collectingNote: Benchmarks are built from aggregated, anonymous market statistics — never from any customer's prompts, reports or identity. Sections below unlock automatically as coverage of your industry and market grows.
benchmarks.placeholderBody: This section unlocks as anonymized market data accumulates for your industry.
benchmarks.shareOfVoiceHint: Your brand vs the market across AI answers
benchmarks.distributionHint: Where brands like yours score in your industry
benchmarks.promptCoverageHint: How many of your market's buyer questions you appear in
benchmarks.benchmarkTrendsHint: How your market's visibility shifts over time
benchmarks.recommendedActionsHint: What top performers in your market do differently
benchmarks.engineRatesHint: How often brands are mentioned and cited per platform, across the whole market
benchmarks.sampleNote: Illustrative distribution shown while the anonymized market corpus grows (under {min} observations). Real aggregates replace it automatically — no customer-specific data is ever shown.

promptExplorer.title: Prompt Explorer
promptExplorer.subtitle: {count} of {max} active prompts on your {plan} plan — the questions we ask every AI platform
promptExplorer.topicHint: Enter a topic like “Digital Marketing”, “CRM” or “AI SEO” — we'll draft the questions your buyers ask
promptExplorer.suggestError: Could not generate suggestions — please try again.
promptExplorer.noSuggestions: No new prompts for this topic — you may already track them all.
promptExplorer.reviewHint: Recommended prompts for “{topic}” — accept, edit or reject before saving. Only accepted prompts are monitored.
promptExplorer.saved: Added {count} prompts — they'll be included in your next scan.
promptExplorer.manualHint: Write the exact question a buyer would ask an AI assistant

conversations.title: Recent AI conversations
conversations.hint: What each platform actually answered — expand a row for the full response, sources and citations

redeem.title: Redeem your lifetime code
redeem.subtitle: Enter your code to activate lifetime access to Sightline.
redeem.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
redeem.needAccount: First, create your free Sightline account (takes under a minute). Your code is applied right after.
redeem.successBody: Welcome aboard! Your plan is active — here's what's included:
